summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of AboutPage.js 12-part mobile-first responsive redesign. ALL 26 test assertions PASSED. Verified: Desktop (1920px) and Mobile (375px) viewports with correct responsive layouts, H1 26px→42px, H2 22px→32px, all grid layouts (hero-badges, meet-grid, stats-grid, video-grid, why-grid, words-grid), review carousel (2-card desktop vs single-card mobile), mobile sticky bar with CALL/BOOK/TEXT buttons, floating BOOK REPAIR button on desktop.
critical_code_review_comments: AboutPage.js uses CSS-in-JS style block with !important rules for responsive overrides - working correctly
Hero badges: 2-col grid (159.5px x2) on mobile, flex row on desktop - PASS
Meet grid: 1fr single column (335px) on mobile, 2-col (476px x2) on desktop - PASS
Stats grid: 2x2 always (162.5px x2 mobile, 233px x2 desktop) - PASS
Video grid: 1fr (327px) on mobile, 2-col (438px x2) on desktop - PASS
Why grid: 1fr (327px) on mobile, 2-col (490px x2) on desktop - PASS
Words grid: 1fr (327px) on mobile, 3-col (317px x3) on desktop - PASS
Mobile sticky bar appears after scrollY > 300 with CALL, BOOK ONLINE, TEXT US buttons
Floating BOOK REPAIR button uses 'hidden md:flex' classes correctly
Service Area shows SF (1), Peninsula (8 cities), Marin (12 cities) with proper city links
context_for_next_testing_agent: AboutPage.js responsive redesign fully verified. Test URL: /about. Mobile tests at 375px viewport, Desktop at 1920px. All responsive CSS classes working: .about-h1, .about-h2, .hero-badges, .meet-grid, .stats-grid, .video-grid, .why-grid, .words-grid, .review-desktop, .review-mobile. Conditional elements (float-btn, mobile sticky bar) appear after scroll > 300px.

page_load.desktop_1920px: PASS - Page loads without console errors
page_load.mobile_375px: PASS - Page loads without console errors

meet_andrei_section.quote_box: PASS - dark navy background with quote

conditional_elements.float_btn_desktop: PASS - appears after scroll > 300, visible: true
